Primary_Text: Alkisah ni sebuah kute kute neggekhi desa megelakh kute kekhan si megelakh ken salah sebuah tanoh alas kabupaten aceh tenggakhe sendah ende Geluh sekelompok masakhakat si gemakh me gotokhoyong te saling membantu sebuah khut lain ne Kalak di geluh mecocok tanemen te mejume ni kakheneken tanoh ne mejile kalihen subukh mebahan hasil panen setiap tahun ne melimpah khuah Kute tekhsebut nipinpin oleh sebuah khaje cut si memekhintah ken secakhe tukhun menukhun te tunduk khut kejujukhen se bulan te setiap tahun ne megikhim ken pajak me sultan aceh dakhussalam Ni kisah ken semenjak menikahi pemain sukhi ne hinge sendah beliau mange kane ni kakhuniai sekalak anak Hal edi kelok lah membahe ken bagi setekhusne ke khajaen si ni pinpin ne kakhene suku alas kakhene suku si menganut sistem patkhilineal si dape menakhik gakhis ketukhunen akhi pihak laki-laki jadi namin laki-laki aminlah si mehak menekhus ken gakhis ketukhunen te menjadi khaje pade suatu bongi sang pemain sukhi khaje medikusi khut lakine kanda engo dekah kite mekhumah tangge nangat khasene adinda memiliki sekalak anak laki-laki benakh adinda kanda menangkat ken hal si bali de kelak pagi aku ni tengo Allah te kite endak lot ketukhunen kanda biakh endak lot nange penekhus kekhajaen ngkekhan ende Bongi ge suntuk khaje te pemain sukhine medikusi gedang Te sohlah pade titik jump pepagi ne kalaki tekhus memulungken kekhine ahli nujum dukun Si mejile lot ni selukhuh tanoh alas kakho te belang kejekhen namun nihil kekhine usahe edi sie-sie telat buah ahli nujum pe si mampu memekhe ken jawaben sikal kegelisahen sepasang suami istekhi edi Hampikh putus ase doe te usahe engo kalaki due ne melaku ken kekhine sohlah pade suatu wakhi tebege oleh sekalak tentang kehebaten sekalak jeme Gukhu mebelin sekalak jeme dukun hebat si tading ni singkil si kehebaten ne malot ni khagu ken nange ni daekhah ne bekhite kesokhokhen dukun edi ni dapet akhi pakhe pedagang alas si melayakh me singkil men jadi ken hasil deleng bage gule pole ketang buah-buahen te balikne kalaki membabe hasil bumi akhi pesisikh bage sikhe ikan laut kekhang te sebagene memege kabakh edi mebahan ate khaje gembikhe kalihen te niat khaje enggo bulet kalihen pepagi ne beliau khut pe main sukhine te pepige pengawal kekhajaen ne bekhangkat me singkil melewati lawe alas khut nangkih bungki si milik layakh pitu wakhi pitu bongi dekah ne untuk soh me singkil si tading ni pesisikh Sesoh ne ni singkil khombongen khaje malet susah mendapat ken ketadingen sang gukhu kakhene enggo bue jeme luakh akhi khoh me singkil amin hendak me daun me sang gukhu Ni khumah gukhu mbelin kalakdi medaun khut tekun te sabakh sang khaje me matuhi kekhine pesakhaten si ni pido oleh dukun mebane Wakhi setekhusne melalu soh pade wakhi enem puluh due sang gukhu mbelin mecekhok balik lah kenin yakinlah bahwe setahun si sikel khoh bekhumu enggo memangku sekalak anak laki-laki khut mebelin ate te penuh hakhapen balik lah kalaki me tanoh alas khut medalan kiding memengketi nangkihe datas tanoh kakho Selame sang khaje tonge ni singkil pengulu mude lah si mekhupe ken engek kandung akhi khaje ngkekhan sang khaje malet nange balik kakhene enggo betah ni tanoh singkil atau nasip naas khombongen khaje jumpe penamun ni pedalanen menuju balik me tanoh alas belin hakhapen pengulu mude Hal edi tekhjadi si ape secakhe otomatis anak mahkota amin lah iye si mehak menjadi khaje setekhus ne menginget sang khaje malot memiliki ke tukhunen si sah

Translated_Text: Once upon a time in a town (Red-Gampong, Nagari, village) called Engkeran Town which is one of the regions of Alas Land, which is the district of Southeast Aceh today. It is said, since marrying his queen until now he has not been blessed with a son. This is very dangerous for the continuation of the kingdom that is led by him, because the Alas tribe is a tribe that adopts the Patrilineal system which draws a lineage from the male side, so only men are entitled to continue the lineage and become king. All night the king and his queen had a long discussion. Almost giving up out of despair, they prayed and they tried everything together. Hearing this news made the king's heart very happy, and the king's desire was very clear that tomorrow was the day that he and the queen and some of his royal guards would go to Singkil, via the Alas River on a sailboat. Arriving at Singkil, the King's entourage had no difficulty finding where the Master Teacher lived, because many people from outside the area came to Singkil to seek treatment from the Master Teacher. The days continued to pass until the 62nd day, when the Master Teacher said, "Go home, you can rest assured that in the coming year your wife will hold a boy child." While the king was in Singkil, Pengulu Mude was the younger brother of King Ngkeran.

Primary_Text: Namun pengkikhaen pengulu mude meleset Sang khaje te bekhune engo balik me kute ne ni kekhan khut wajah mesekhi-sekhi te siap menjabut saat-saat si Nitimai soh Pige bulan kemudian bekhune mengandung bage si ni kateken si dukun Senanglah kikhene sang khaje memege kabakh bahwe sang bekhune enggo mengandung sekalak anak Kabakh mengandung ne bekhu sang khaje ni sambut suke-cite oleh selukhuh khakyat ni kekhajaen cut edi Kekhine khut kegembikhen namun malet bagi pengulu mude Niat ate ne menjadi khaje sikel sulit tekhcape khut kehadikhen sekalak anak akhi sang khaje Kane munculah niat jahat akhi pengulu mude untuk menyingkikhken calon bayi sang khaje khut memido sekalak ahli nujum untuk mebahan sebuah tekhadep bayi si ni angap oleh pengulu mude sebage pembabe bencane bagi geluh ne Wahai tukang nujum bendelah kite me khumah khaje Aku sikel nimai kao mecekhok tebe sang khaje bahwe anak si kelak sikel lahekh edi adalah anak si amin membabe balepetake te membabe semsakhe ni negekhi ende Pengulu mude memekhe ken akhah tebe dukun tekhsebut Pak dukun si hebat de lah khencane edi mekhasil sehinge anak khaje edi nahan ne tekhsingkikh te aku sikel menjadi khaje kelak kao sikel aku angkat menjadi penasehat kekhajaen Te sikel aku kheken imbalan tebemu kobo sebue pitu buah te Ogek main gembikhene ahli sihikh edi memegeken imbalan si nidapet ne khut modal amin mengasud sang khaje Edi oyeklah pebahane si sulit bagi ne sewakhi-wakhi aminlah mebuali pakhe wakhge si medaun tebene Ampun mekhibu ampun tuan ku penguase lawe alas de kekhohen hambe bende amilah kabakh suke cite amin Tukang nujum mengadep me tungkuk te memekhe hokhmat ne Menukhut pengekhawangen hambe dapeti akhi toh munyang kite kelahekhen anak tuan ku khaje amin sikel membabe bale betabe ni negekhi kite ende negekhi si enggo tuan ku pinpin metahun-tahun te menjadi ken ne makmukh aman te hasil bumi tetap melimpah khuah Kekhine sikel bene khut sekejap mate te kejayaen si tuan ku miliki sendah khut lahekh ne anak pekhtame tuan ku te si hambu biakhi sikel khoh lah male-male kesuliten menekhpe tandi alas jaye sakti ende bage musibah banjikh meyebakhne peyakit te hame-hame senuan sikel khoh megekhogoti tanemen-tanemen pakhe patani kite Kite kane kekhohen bangse kuling mentakh si sikel menjajah negkhi kite te kelak khaje sikel nibunuh ne kane Benakhkah edi si kao kate ken wahai ahli nujum Kune pagitne bekhite si kao babe ken tebeku padahal bakhu bone aku te bekhu ku bahagie meyambut kekhohen buah ate si enggo dekah kalihen kami idam-idamken Sang khaje amin tekhtandok lemes toh malet pekhcaye kekhine edi Ampun mekhibu ampun tuan ku ogek ate mebahan tuan ku semakin khisau tapi hambe aminlah sekalak jeme ahli nujum si mendapetken wasiat akhi ninik moyang kite Takhus kae si hakhus aku pekhbuat wahai ahli nujum Sebaik ne tuan ku membunuh anak edi atau mengasingken ne sebuah ekas si dauh akhi negekhi kite ende Wakhi demi wakhi enggo melalu soh lah pade bulan ke-siwah bage si enggo ni pekikheken lahikhlah sekalak anak bayi laki-laki si sehat te ganteng te oleh uwakne iye ni ekhe gelakh Si Layakh ni kakheneken bungki si membabe uwak te amek ne me singkil mengane ken layakh sebagae salah sebuah pegekhoken ne bekhite ke gantengen te lahekh ne anak sang khaje engkekhan soh kane tebe cuping penguase akhi natam si malet lain adalah mame Si Layakh sendikhi Kane khoh lah khombongen penguase natam akhi edi mengkekhan mengato langsung bayi si layakh si ganteng Se enggo mekhumukh lebih kukhang lebih waluh belas tahun kegantengen Si Layakh semakin jelas ni banding ken khut pemude-pemude lain ne ni tanoh Alas edi Kekhine nakkhu te okhang tue kalihen beliu ate ne memiliki si layakh menjadi laki atau pemain kalakdi endak tekhkecuali khut bekhu dinam anak khu akhi khakyat penguase natam mame Si Layakh

Translated_Text: But Pengulu Mude's understanding of the situation was far from the truth. News of the king's wife's pregnancy  was welcomed with joy by all of the people in the small kingdom. "Hi fortune-teller, let us go to the king's house. "Sir, the great shaman...if this plan is successful, so that the king's son will be eliminated, and I will become king later, I will appoint you as the royal adviser." It was no surprise that the sorcerer listened to the reward that he would receive while putting his stock in its provoking the king. "Forgive me, my lord, the lord over the Alas River...if I only come here to bring news of joy (sorrow?)." "According to the insight that I found from our ancestors, the birth of the son of my lord the king will only bring misfortune to our country, the land that my lord has led for many years and has made prosperous, safe, and that is still fruitful.  Is that really what you say, fortune-teller? "Forgive me, my lord. "Then, what should I do, fortune-teller?" "It would be better if my lord killed the child or set him apart in a place far from our country..." Day after day passed until the 9th month, and as  expected, a healthy and handsome baby boy was born. And his father gave him the name Si Layakh, because of the boat that brought his father and mother to Singkil a long time ago using the sail as its power. After he was about 18 years old, Si Layakh's good looks, intelligence, and prowess were increasingly clear compared to other youths in the Alas Land.

Translated_Text: The excitement of seeing the child's growth and development suddenly disappeared one day when the king recalled what the fortune-teller had said about the threat of disaster and danger that would befall the king and the Alas land. Si Layakh should have been killed when he was born, but Si Layakh's mother pleaded to the king so that little Si Layakh would not be put to death that day. "How could you kill him?  When the boy was 18 years old, the king felt Si Layakh was old enough to defend himself, with heaviness the king ordered his son to leave his mother, home, and land of his birth to wander in the wilderness alone for an unspecified amount of time. The news of Si Layakh's exile also reached the ears of his uncle in Natam, so he sent his cousin Bru Dinam to Ngkeran to meet Si Layakh and bring him to Natam. "Where is the child of my uncle?" "Ahh...your cousin is already in the wilderness, what are the things that you want to meet with him about, my niece?" "I have something important to discuss with him, there is a message from my father, however I must find Si Layakh." Bru Dinam went to the wilderness to meet her cousin, and in the wilderness she found Si Layakh who was already very skinny, weak, and pale looking as if he had no desire to live anymore, but his good looks did not disappear either. "O my kindhearted cousin, not that I am unaware of my uncle's orders, but this is an order from my own father so if I die here I am willing and I will not leave this wilderness until there is a direct order from my father..." One day when Si Layakh was shepherding in the mountains, he did not have clothing because his clothes had already been completely worn out when he was searching for fruit in the wilderness. The grandmother with blurry vision tried to see who it was that was upsetting her today. He looked like a human, but was not dressed like a human (not following Shari'ah law). A voice came from behind the wood; "Hi ma'am... I am a human just like you, but I am not brave enough to go out because I do not have clothes anymore." The way it usually works in that area when women go to the fields, or to the rice paddies, or other work affairs, the women usually carry at least two pieces of cloth, one to tie at the waist and one to be used as a sarung. Then the woman opened the cloth that was tied to her waist and threw it to Si Layakh.
Comment: This appears to be a translation of part of the story from https://kaisosogarcia.blogspot.com/2016/04/si-layakh-cerita-rakyat-dari-kutacane.html. However, I have been told the Alas is good in it.

Translated_Text: Si Layakh's uncle who was in Natam wanted to build a new house, so the whole family was invited from Ngkeran to a thankfulness feast in Natam. As if he had an inner bond with his uncle, Si Layakh decided to go down the mountain for the first time since being exiled by his father, he wanted to find out what was making his heart so anxious today. One of the citizens of the village gave an explanation that the family had been invited to Natam to attend the thanksgiving ceremony for the establishment of his uncle's new house. Feeling responsible as one of the family members, Si Layakh's heart felt called to go to the thankgsiving ceremony even though he had a small feeling of extreme disappointment in his heart because it seemed like his presence was not wanted by his family.

Translated_Text: all failed before the fortune-teller was called to find out what made the main pillar of wood very difficult to lift up erectly by young men whose bodies were not like twigs. "We are not able to build this house...actually there is a supernatural child who has magical power, and is related to you, All the residents were confused by the statement of the fortune-teller. "Allow your servant, master of the whole land of Natam, to help..." Si Layakh cried out a little and suddenly made the tone of the situation become empty and quiet as if they considered the power possessed by the filthy and tattered youth to be strange and trivial. "Please do, young person!" Si Layakh's uncle also did not recognize his nephew very well because the last time he met with Si Layakh was when he was doing a circumcision. By a little recitation of the mantra in the water he requested, Si Layakh splashed the water all over the main pillar of the house, and miraculously, Si Layakh raised the pole alone without the help of anyone else, by this event all the citizens were amazed and cheered happily. "Who are you, young man?" "My lord's servant, Si Layakh the cow shepherd from the jungle of Engkran..." "You are my nephew that I have been searching for, come here, son, why are your clothes...!" The air of emotion enveloping the festivities that should have been that day was joy to all the citizens of Natam plus the shame of the royal family of Ngkran who showed that they had the heart to let a family member be displaced in the forest to struggle to live alone. The Ngkran royal family spent the night in Natam a few days in honor of the ruler of Natam. Pengulu Mude's heart began to worry again about his nephew being there and becoming his rival to become the next king, so an evil desire arose to finish off his nephew that day.

Primary_Text: Keluakhge khaje Natam bakhu pelin menikmati suasane khumah bakhu khumah si megah ni banding ken khumah-khumah lain ne Namun keyamanen khumah bakhu edi tekhusik khut dempiken-dempiken pakhau akhi sahung khumah Se engo ni ato me sahung khumah tekhyate engo cindekh tegak sebuah manuk keluki delaki dempik-dempik kekhas se sikel me mekhe sebuah petande kabakh malot mejile enggo kabakh edi akhi dape asal ne Kabakh malot mejile kae si sedang ni ekhe etoh oleh mu wahai keluki bekhu dinam sikel mencube menpelehjemah ken sendikhi maksud akhi si keluki mulai muncul uwas-uwas ni ate ne tekhjadi sebuah khut khombongen khaje ngkhan kakhene ke ekhohen keluki edi dekah semase khombongen belin edi menadingken tanoh Natam Kane meyusullah sekelompok cut pengawal kekhajaen Natam untuk meyusul khombongen khaje ngkhan Tepat amin sesohne ni pulo biang idah akhi tekhuh jukhang sesosok manusie si tekgeletak bage engo malot menawe nange Kane untuk memasti ken ise manusie edi kane tukhunlah salah sebuah pengawal mengato langsung te tekhyate Si Layakh lah si kalaki dapeti Napos ne me engah engah te deyat nadi ne se sikel-sikel bene te balik megekhot Kane ni babelah tubuh ne se engo geluh Si Layakh me Natam te ni dauni oleh tabit dukun mentakh Biase ne jeme si mengalami pekhistiwe demikian pakhah edi malot mampu nange untuk geluh namun tuhan mekehendak lain Si Layakh tonge nemu metahan te mulai jahan jakh pulih tule Untuk se mentakhe waktu iye tetap ni Natam tanoh kekuasaen mame ne ni adih iye sikel ni lindungi akhi segale acamen Memege kabakh bahwe Si Layakh tonge geluh Pengulu Mude mekhase ngekhi kane mengato bebekhe ne si bage memiliki nawe 1000 nawe ne iye Engo mencube pigekali pekhcubaen memunuh namun kekhi ne nihil Mungkin pekhencane en ne amin si mange ni susun mejile Pengulu Mude mencube meyakin ken dikhi Kane ni susunlah sebuah kiasat licik te keji untuk benakh-benakh memunuh bekhene sendikhi kane laus lah Pengulu Mude me khaje ngkran abang ne sendikhi untuk bekhangkat menukokh pige-pige kobo Namun iye malot me cekhite ken tebe sang khaje bahwe Si Layakh khut khut  ne me belangkejekhen

engo ukhusen selese kekhi te kekhi medalan khut mejile amin kane memutus ken untuk balik tule me tanoh alas Kalakdi due medalan kiding te tekadang sang bungki te hanjakh-hanjakh mulai menadingken penduduk te memengketi wilayah pengukhusen si memiliki dalan si cukham kalihen te malot penduduk pengukhusen sendah ende mang mebagas daekhah gukhah si mekhupeken tanoh si me deleng deleng te medeleng te kane pas pekhbatasen khut tanoh gayo Si Layakh khut mepikekh positif medalan ni hadep malot mempekhduli ken gekh-gekhit mame ne akhi pudi Pak cik ne Pengulu Mude sambil mengelem sebuah kayu si belin kalihen engo me siap untuk memopok Si Layakh te ni saat waktu si tepat ni popoklah Si Layakh iye sesikel malot medaye khut kejine tubuh Si Layakh untuk ke due kaline ni dabuh ken me jukhang si tekhjal Pengulu Mude khut nahang ne mebabe kobo edi balik me tanoh alas tanpa mekhase medose khut sekali khut bebekhe ne Tanoh si menjadi dabuh ne Si Layakh ni pengukhusen ni pekhcaye penduduk se ekas desa ende malet dapet geluh nange te kane pe geluh binatan malot kane pot dohokh te memangan dukut ne pe pekhsi si mengate ken bahwe khiwayat geluh Si Layakh amin soh ni pengukhusen pelin iye ni bunuh te geluh ne ni mutilasi oleh mame ne te tanoh pas mengekhet tubuh Si Layakh malot nange ni geluhi oleh dukut te hewan-hewan malot mendohokhi ekas edi Selame telu wakhi se engo pekhistiwe keji edi sohlah Pengulu Mude me tanoh Natam te mencekhiteken pekhistiwe tekhagedis si iye kakhang sendikhi tentang Si Layakh bahwe mame ne tekhbunuh oleh sebuah khimo si ganas kalihen ni pekhbatasen khut tanoh Translated_Text: With some trickery and flattery plus the innocence of Si Layakh who still thinks positively of his uncle who clearly has caused a lot of suffering for his own little life, Si Layakh believed that this was an order from his father to send him to Blangkejeren to buy some water buffalo.  Arriving in the Gayo highlands, a number of water buffalo were bought as originally planned. They both walked and sometimes rode the buffalo and slowly began to leave the residential area and entered the district that had a very steep road with no residents.  Si Layakh, still thinking positively, went ahead without regarding the movements of his uncle from behind.  Pengulu Mude brought the buffalo back to Alas Land, without feeling at all guilty about his nephew. The land that became the site of Si Layakh's fall in this slippery area is believed by the villagers living in that village that it will never live again, and animal life also will not come near it and eat its grass. Three days went by after the cruel event, Pengulu Mude arrived to the land of Natam, and told the tragic story that he made up himself about Si Layakh, that his nephew was murdered by a wild tiger at the Gayo Land border.  Pengulu Mude began to try to seduce Bru Dinam to just marry him who apparently had romantic feelings himself for the beauty that she possessed. The invitation was not immediately accepted by Bru Dinam who was still very devastated by the death of Si Layakh.  Finally Bru Dinam's heart was weakened by Pengulu Mude's perserverance, plus Si Layakh never returned and would certainly also never return, at the urging of her parents as well, Pengulu Mude's proposal was also finally accepted.
